_12 brands have a description but are missing a hero image._

*Link Health Check:*
⚠️ Could not be performed this run — the execution environment's network policy blocks outbound HTTP to external sites. All 181 URL checks returned a connection timeout (code 0), which reflects an infrastructure constraint rather than actual broken links.
_Recommendation: run link checks from an environment with unrestricted egress (e.g., a GitHub Actions workflow or local machine)._

*Zero Content (0):*
All clear — every approved brand has at least a description.
